message:
test(comparison): add unit tests for rank-correlation, biological-metrics, and synteny

Add 94 new unit tests for comparison package modules:
- rank-correlation.test.ts: Spearman's rho, Kendall's tau, Hoeffding's D
- biological-metrics.test.ts: GC content, ANI, RSCU, amino acid usage
- synteny.test.ts: DTW-based synteny alignment

Total tests: 833 passing (up from 739)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
